message:
chore(agentdb): add benchmark results, fix route.ts lint, update gitignore

- Add .rvf and .rvf.lock to .gitignore (runtime data files)
- Add latest benchmark results (2 runs)
- Fix route.ts: add eslint-disable, remove unused path import,
  fix control character regex
- Update bench-data graph files and benchmark results

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -120,3 +120,7 @@ coordination/orchestration/*
 claude-flow
 # Removed Windows wrapper files per user request
 hive-mind-prompt-*.txt
+
+# RVF runtime data
+*.rvf
+*.rvf.lock

+# Parallel Execution Benchmark Report
+
+**Generated:** 2/13/2026, 4:43:57 PM
+**Iterations:** 3
+**Mode:** Standard
+
+## Topology Comparison
+
+| Topology     | Avg Time | Min Time | Max Time | Success Rate | Valid Results |
+| ------------ | -------- | -------- | -------- | ------------ | ------------- |
+| Mesh         | 160333ms | 156720ms | 165814ms | 100.0%       | 3/3           |
+| Hierarchical | 196863ms | 182095ms | 216169ms | 100.0%       | 3/3           |
+| Ring         | 107682ms | 97011ms  | 118708ms | 100.0%       | 3/3           |
+
+## Speedup Analysis
+
+- **mesh**: 1.00x speedup (0.0% faster than baseline)
+- **hierarchical**: 0.81x speedup (-22.8% slower than baseline)
+- **ring**: 1.49x speedup (32.8% faster than baseline)
+
+## Performance Grades
+
+- **mesh**: A - Excellent performance
+- **hierarchical**: B - Good performance
+- **ring**: A - Excellent performance
+
+## Recommendations
+
+1. Best topology for this workload: ring (107682ms avg)
+
+## Raw Results
+
